Package org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.tactics

Class CombinedTacticViewer

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.jface.viewers.Viewer
org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ContentViewer
org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.tactics.AbstractTacticViewer<ITacticDescriptor>
org.eventb.internal.ui.preferences.tactics.CombinedTacticViewer
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.viewers.IInputProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.IInputSelectionProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ISelectionProvider
public class CombinedTacticViewer extends AbstractTacticViewer<ITacticDescriptor>

    • getEditResult

      public ITacticDescriptor getEditResult()
      Description copied from class: AbstractTacticViewer
      Returns the value of the descriptor with currently displayed state.

      If there are changes, a new descriptor is returned. If there are no changes, the input instance is returned. Therefore, it is possible to determine if changes occurred by comparing (==) input and edit result.

      Specified by:
      getEditResult in class AbstractTacticViewer<ITacticDescriptor>
      Returns:
      a tactic descriptor
